title: Resource Time
description: This modpack is made for fans of resource packs, as well as for regular players
body:
# **Thanks to this modpack, you can easily work with Minecraft resource packs**

![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8c2d642231212917e1bcd8f3a43f9f6360e8502_0.webp)


**FEATURES:**

- Error-free resource pack handling

- 1-click installs - Direct downloads from CurseForge & Modrinth

- Enhanced workflow - Smoother resource pack editing than ever

- Renamed pack support

- Built-in optimization

- Zoom

- Shader support

- No chat reports

## Mods from modpack:

[ThreadTweak](https://modrinth.com/mod/threadtweak)

[Noisium](https://modrinth.com/mod/noisium)
 
[EntityCulling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)
 
[BadOptimizations](https://modrinth.com/mod/badoptimizations/version/2.2.1)

[More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling)

[Language Reload](https://modrinth.com/mod/language-reload)

[Concurrent Chunk Management Engine (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric)

[Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)

[Resourcify](https://modrinth.com/mod/resourcify)

[ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix)

[Very Many Players (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/vmp-fabric)

[Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)

[Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify)

[OptiGUI](https://modrinth.com/mod/optigui)

[Remove Reloading Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/rrls)

[FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)

[No Chat Reports](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-reports)

[Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)

[Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)

[ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast)

[Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe)

[Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)

[[EMF] Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)

[[ESF] Entity Sound Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/esf)

[CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)

[FabricSkyboxes](https://modrinth.com/mod/nuit)

[FabricSkyBoxes Interop](https://modrinth.com/mod/nuit-interop)

[RP Renames](https://modrinth.com/mod/rp-renames)

[Draggable Lists](https://modrinth.com/mod/draggable-lists)
